description_long: This is a vintage arcade game cabinet with a weathered blue exterior, featuring rust-like stains and nautical-themed graphics. The front panel displays a large screen area with Russian text and a dramatic illustration of a naval battle, while the lower section has a door with a compass rose design that is ajar, revealing the interior. The control panel is equipped with a prominent black periscope-like device and several buttons, some of which are labeled in Russian. The side panels are decorated with stylized waves and a ship, reinforcing the maritime theme. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with some plastic and glass components for the screen and controls. The overall appearance suggests significant age and use, with visible wear and patina throughout.
description: A weathered, blue arcade game cabinet with nautical graphics, a periscope control, and a partially open lower door. The cabinet features Russian text, a naval battle marquee, and heavy signs of age and use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen with Russian text, periscope control, buttons, and an open lower door with a compass rose design.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ship and wave graphics, as well as the open door and the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain blue, rust-stained back panel with no visible features or graphics.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, displaying the ship and wave graphics and the open door from a different angle.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a thick bezel and visible wear
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with a central periscope control and several round buttons arranged around it, some with faded labels
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features dramatic red, white, and green artwork depicting a naval battle, with bold Russian text and an action-oriented theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display stylized waves and a ship in dark blue and white, with rust stains and a nautical theme
